description.en: The frogfish is a master of camouflage that prefers to walk on the ocean floor using its modified fins rather than swim.
description.zh: 躄鱼（青蛙鱼）是伪装大师，它们更喜欢用演化过的鱼鳍在海底「行走」而不是游泳。

anatomy.en: They have chunky, uneven bodies covered in hair-like skin flaps that help them blend perfectly into their surroundings, like sponges or rocks. Their pectoral fins have evolved to look and act like little legs.
anatomy.zh: 它们的身体粗壮且凹凸不平，长满了像毛发一样的皮瓣，能帮助它们完美融入周围的海绵或岩石环境中。它们的胸鳍演化得像小腿一样，可以用来行走。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Like their deep-sea anglerfish cousins, they have a built-in fishing rod to lure prey. They have one of the fastest bites in the animal kingdom, opening their mouths to suck in fish in just a few milliseconds.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 就像它们的深海鮟鱇鱼亲戚一样，它们也自带一根钓竿来引诱猎物。它们拥有动物界最快的咬合速度之一，只需几毫秒就能张开大口将鱼吸入。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Striated frogfish live in the shallow, tropical and subtropical waters of the Indian and Pacific Oceans, often hiding in coral reefs and sandy areas.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 条纹躄鱼生活在印度洋和太平洋的热带及亚热带浅水区，经常隐藏在珊瑚礁和沙地中。

habitat.text_en: Tropical shallow reefs and sandy bottoms
habitat.text_zh: 热带浅水珊瑚礁及沙底
